title: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if content has been generated by AI

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act (CAITA) protects consumers by giving them the ability to determine if content has been generated by AI.",
    "CAITA requires large generative AI companies to label AI-generated content.",
    "CAITA provides consumers with an AI-detection tool to assess content's origin when a label isn't readily available.",
    "SB 942 will require that starting in 2026, large Generative Artificial Intelligence providers must give users the option to have a manifest disclosure on any GenAI-generated content.",
    "SB 942 will require large GenAI providers to label AI-generated content with a latent disclosure, which is imperceptible to the human eye.",
    "SB 942 mandates that large GenAI providers make an AI detection tool available at no cost to users.",
    "The implementation of CAITA aims to create an ecosystem of tools and technology that empowers consumers and provides needed GenAI transparency."
  ]
}
```
